ns0:entry.ns0:title: Adam-CAD/CADAM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Adam-CAD/CADAM
Language: typescript
CADAM is the open source text-to-CAD web application

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lum1104/Understand-Anything
Language: typescript
Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock
Language: typescript
OpenStock is an open-source alternative to expensive market platforms. Track real-time prices, set personalized alerts, and explore detailed company insights — built openly, for everyone, forever free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alpic-ai/skybridge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alpic-ai/skybridge
Language: typescript
Skybridge is a full-stack TypeScript framework for MCP Apps and ChatGPT Apps. Type-safe. React-powered. Platform-agnostic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anyproto/anytype-ts
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anyproto/anytype-ts
Language: typescript
Official Anytype client for MacOS, Linux, and Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: colbymchenry/codegraph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/colbymchenry/codegraph
Language: typescript
Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

ns0:entry.ns0:title: earendil-works/pi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/earendil-works/pi
Language: typescript
AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

ns0:entry.ns0:title: garrytan/gstack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/garrytan/gstack
Language: typescript
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

ns0:entry.ns0:title: immich-app/immich
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/immich-app/immich
Language: typescript
High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kil0bit-kb/scrcpy-gui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kil0bit-kb/scrcpy-gui
Language: typescript
A modern, high-performance GUI for the scrcpy

ns0:entry.ns0:title: marktext/marktext
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/marktext/marktext
Language: typescript
📝A simple and elegant markdown editor, available for Linux, macOS and Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: multica-ai/multica
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/multica-ai/multica
Language: typescript
The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: siddharthvaddem/openscreen
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/siddharthvaddem/openscreen
Language: typescript
Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thedotmack/claude-mem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
Language: typescript
Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More

ns0:entry.ns0:title: twentyhq/twenty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/twentyhq/twenty
Language: typescript
The open alternative to Salesforce, designed for AI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vas3k/TaxHacker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vas3k/TaxHacker
Language: typescript
Self-hosted AI accounting app. LLM analyzer for receipts, invoices, transactions with custom prompts and categories
